scripts.build:all: bun run build:extract && bun run build:ts
scripts.build:showcase: bun run build:ts && bun run --filter './packages/showcase' build
scripts.rebuild: bun run clean:full && bun run build:all
scripts.verify: bun run verify:lint && bun run verify:compile && bun run verify:types && bun run verify:unit:ts && bun run verify:unit:rust && bun run verify:canary
scripts.verify:full: bun run verify && bun run verify:integration && bun run verify:build:next && bun run verify:build:showcase && bun run verify:build:vite && bun run verify:assert:next && bun run verify:assert:showcase && bun run verify:assert:vite
scripts.verify:ci: bun run verify:lint && bun run verify:unit:rust && bun run verify:hygiene:rust && bun run verify:hygiene:ts && bun run build:extract && bun run build:ts && bun run verify:compile && bun run verify:types && bun run verify:unit:ts && bun run verify:canary && bun run verify:integration && bun run verify:build:showcase && bun run verify:assert:showcase && bun run verify:build:vite && bun run verify:assert:vite
scripts.verify:next: bun run verify:build:next && bun run verify:assert:next
scripts.verify:showcase: bun run verify:build:showcase && bun run verify:assert:showcase
scripts.verify:vite: bun run verify:build:vite && bun run verify:assert:vite
scripts.deploy:showcase: bun run build:showcase && bunx netlify deploy --dir=packages/showcase/dist --prod
